zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight於大約1211年出生在英國諾福爾可雪登時，他的父親Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton10歲，母親Mrs Nicholas de Shelton12歲。他和Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1271年2月21日在英國諾福爾可洛登享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight于大约1211年出生在英国諾福爾可雪登时，他的父亲Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton10岁，母亲Mrs Nicholas de Shelton12岁。他和Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1271年2月21日在英国諾福爾可洛登享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Shelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight was born about 1211, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, his father, Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton, was 10 and his mother, Mrs Nicholas de Shelton, was 12. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton. He died on 21 February 1271, in Loddon, Norfolk, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight est né environ 1211, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nicholas de Shelton, avait 12 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton. Il est décédé le 21 février 1271, à Loddon, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight um 1211 in Shelton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton 10 und seine Mutter Mrs Nicholas de Shelton 12. Er hatte mit Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Februar 1271 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Loddon, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight è nato il circa 1211 nel Shelton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton, aveva 10 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Nicholas de Shelton, aveva 12 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton. Morì il 21 febbraio 1271, nel Loddon, Norfolk, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knightが約1211年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Sheltonは10歳，母Mrs Nicholas de Sheltonは12歳であった。彼はLady Isabell Westwick de Sheltonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1271年2月21日にイギリスノーフォルクロッドオンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight(이)가 대략 1211년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Nicholas de Shelton(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 2월 21일 영국 노르폴크 로던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight nasceu aproximadamente 1211, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nicholas de Shelton, tinha 12 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton. Ele faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1271, em Loddon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight родился около 1211 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nicholas de Shelton, 12. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton. Он умер 21 февраля 1271 г. в местности лоддон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight nació aproximadamente 1211, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas De Shelton 6th Lord Shelton, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Mrs Nicholas de Shelton, tenía 12 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1271, en Loddon, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
